changelog: YouTube Charts: official trending/top charts per country
Home: progressive loading (Phase 1 instant, Phase 2 streaming)
kworb trending with /player metadata (artist, views, upload time)
Search: WEB client with visitorData, auth skip for signed-in users
QR code sign-in: custom vertical layout, soft background
48 languages: localized search queries from string resources
Performance: SplashActivity prewarm, parallel search with jitter
Channel diversity: max 2 per shelf, refresh throttle (soft/medium/hard)
changelog_zh: YouTube 官方排行榜：依國家顯示熱門/排行/歌曲
首頁：分段載入（Phase 1 即時顯示，Phase 2 串流追加）
kworb 即時熱門：完整資訊（藝人、觀看數、上傳時間）
搜尋：WEB client + visitorData，登入後也正常運作
QR code 登入：垂直佈局，柔和背景
語言/國家：獨立設定不互相干擾
48 種語言：本地化搜尋關鍵字
效能：SplashActivity 預熱、並行搜尋+抖動
內容多樣性：同頻道≤2、refresh 節流
